text: Stack Exchange and Wikipedia occupy a shared space in my head: a steady stream of negative publicity over the years, and yet I'm surprised to look back and realize the years that have passed without any noticeable drop in their quality as a reader. I still veer away from trying to contribute much to them. But I'm very glad now that they exist.
